title.zh: 中国储能电池系统进入马尔代夫：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國儲能電池系統進入馬爾地夫：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China battery energy storage system documentation against Maldives Energy Authority (MEA) and Ministry of Environment requirements, IEC 62619 and IEC 62933 international standards referenced in ADB/AIIB-funded solar-plus-storage project specifications, STELCO and FENAKA grid-connection requirements for Greater Malé and outer-atoll grids, NFPA 855 fire-safety installation expectations, UN 38.3 and IEC 62281 transport requirements, and 230/400 V 50 Hz grid context — versus China GB/T 36276, GB/T 34131, GB 38031, and GB/T 36558 baselines. Includes environmental derating guidance for Maldives extreme heat, humidity, and salt-mist conditions.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国储能电池系统文件与马尔代夫能源局（MEA）及环境部要求、ADB/亚投行资助的光储项目规格中引用的IEC 62619和IEC 62933国际标准、STELCO（马累大区）和FENAKA（外部环礁）并网要求、NFPA 855消防安全安装要求、UN 38.3和IEC 62281运输要求及230/400 V 50 Hz电网背景——对比中国GB/T 36276、GB/T 34131、GB 38031和GB/T 36558基准的差距对照，并包含针对马尔代夫极端高温、高湿及盐雾环境的降额指导。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國儲能電池系統文件與馬爾地夫能源局（MEA）及環境部要求、ADB/亞投行資助的光儲項目規格中引用的IEC 62619和IEC 62933國際標準、STELCO（馬累大區）和FENAKA（外部環礁）併網要求、NFPA 855消防安全安裝要求、UN 38.3和IEC 62281運輸要求及230/400 V 50 Hz電網背景——對比中國GB/T 36276、GB/T 34131、GB 38031和GB/T 36558基準的差距對照，並包含針對馬爾地夫極端高溫、高濕及鹽霧環境的降額指導。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, MEA approval, STELCO or FENAKA grid-connection approval, fire-safety installation approval, dangerous-goods classification, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, designers, and installers should verify current Maldives Energy Authority requirements, STELCO and FENAKA grid-connection technical specifications, Ministry of Environment environmental requirements, UN transport regulations, and project-owner requirements with qualified professionals before shipment or installation. Maldives does not currently have a comprehensive standalone national BESS safety standard — requirements are project-specific, IEC-aligned, and subject to change as MEA regulatory capacity develops.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、MEA审批、STELCO或FENAKA并网批准、消防安全安装批准、危险货物分类、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商、设计方和安装方在出货或安装前应与合格专业人士核验现行马尔代夫能源局要求、STELCO和FENAKA并网技术规格、环境部环境要求、UN运输法规及项目业主要求。马尔代夫目前尚无综合性独立国家BESS安全标准——要求为项目专属、IEC对齐，并随MEA监管能力的发展而变化。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、MEA審批、STELCO或FENAKA併網批准、消防安全安裝批准、危險貨物分類、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商、設計方和安裝方在出貨或安裝前應與合格專業人士核驗現行馬爾地夫能源局要求、STELCO和FENAKA併網技術規格、環境部環境要求、UN運輸法規及項目業主要求。馬爾地夫目前尚無綜合性獨立國家BESS安全標準——要求為項目專屬、IEC對齊，並隨MEA監管能力的發展而變化。

answer_first.en: Maldives does not have a confirmed standalone mandatory national BESS product safety regulation. BESS projects in the Maldives — principally ADB/AIIB-funded solar-plus-storage projects serving STELCO (Greater Malé) and FENAKA (outer atolls) grids — operate under project-specific international standards, MEA approval, and utility grid-connection requirements. The practical gaps for Chinese BESS exported to the Maldives are: (1) IEC 62619 cell and module safety evidence as the IEC-aligned baseline expected in ADB/AIIB project specifications and MEA approvals; (2) IEC 62933 system-level technical requirements where referenced in STELCO or FENAKA connection agreements; (3) NFPA 855 or equivalent fire-safety installation documentation — Maldives has no dedicated national fire code and project specifications typically reference international codes; (4) UN 38.3 and IEC 62281 transport test documentation mandatory under international transport conventions — all BESS goods arrive by sea freight only, with no direct air cargo option for large systems; (5) voltage mismatch — Maldives operates at 230/400 V 50 Hz whereas China's LV grid is 220/380 V; PCS protection and ride-through parameters must be reconfigured; (6) environmental derating — extreme equatorial heat (32–35°C ambient), relative humidity above 80%, and severe salt-mist conditions require explicit IP-rating, corrosion-resistance, and thermal-management evidence not captured in Chinese domestic type-tests. Chinese GB/T 36276, GB/T 34131, GB 38031, and GB/T 36558 represent the manufacturing baseline but are not accepted as substitutes for IEC evidence in project or MEA review.
answer_first.zh: 马尔代夫尚无经确认的独立强制性国家BESS产品安全法规。马尔代夫的BESS项目——主要是服务STELCO（马累大区）和FENAKA（外部环礁）电网的ADB/亚投行资助光储项目——依据项目专属国际标准、MEA审批及公用事业并网要求运作。中国BESS出口马尔代夫的实际差距包括：（1）IEC 62619电芯和模组安全证据，作为ADB/亚投行项目规格和MEA审批中预期的IEC对齐基准；（2）STELCO或FENAKA并网协议中引用的IEC 62933系统级技术要求；（3）NFPA 855或等效消防安全安装文件——马尔代夫无专用国家消防规范，项目规格通常引用国际规范；（4）国际运输公约强制要求的UN 38.3和IEC 62281运输测试文件——所有BESS货物仅通过海运抵达，大型系统无直接空运选项；（5）电压差异——马尔代夫运行在230/400 V 50 Hz，而中国低压电网为220/380 V；储能变流器保护和穿越参数须重新配置；（6）环境降额——极端赤道高温（环境温度32–35°C）、相对湿度超过80%及严重盐雾条件，需要提供中国国内型式测试未涵盖的IP防护等级、耐腐蚀性和热管理明确证据。中国GB/T 36276、GB/T 34131、GB 38031和GB/T 36558是生产基准，但在项目或MEA审查中不被接受为IEC证据的替代依据。
answer_first.zht: 馬爾地夫尚無經確認的獨立強制性國家BESS產品安全法規。馬爾地夫的BESS項目——主要是服務STELCO（馬累大區）和FENAKA（外部環礁）電網的ADB/亞投行資助光儲項目——依據項目專屬國際標準、MEA審批及公用事業併網要求運作。中國BESS出口馬爾地夫的實際差距包括：（1）IEC 62619電芯和模組安全證據，作為ADB/亞投行項目規格和MEA審批中預期的IEC對齊基準；（2）STELCO或FENAKA併網協議中引用的IEC 62933系統級技術要求；（3）NFPA 855或等效消防安全安裝文件——馬爾地夫無專用國家消防規範，項目規格通常引用國際規範；（4）國際運輸公約強制要求的UN 38.3和IEC 62281運輸測試文件——所有BESS貨物僅通過海運抵達，大型系統無直接空運選項；（5）電壓差異——馬爾地夫運行在230/400 V 50 Hz，而中國低壓電網為220/380 V；儲能變流器保護和穿越參數須重新配置；（6）環境降額——極端赤道高溫（環境溫度32–35°C）、相對濕度超過80%及嚴重鹽霧條件，需要提供中國國內型式測試未涵蓋的IP防護等級、耐腐蝕性和熱管理明確證據。中國GB/T 36276、GB/T 34131、GB 38031和GB/T 36558是製造基準，但在項目或MEA審查中不被接受為IEC證據的替代依據。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, grid operator, utility, customs, dangerous-goods authority, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
